## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff (check `.env.example` placeholders)
- [ ] Touched UI? Tested on mobile viewport (DevTools responsive mode or phone via ngrok)
- [ ] Added or changed schema? Migration SQL noted in the PR body
- [ ] Added a new edge function / middleware route? Auth gate + CORS are in place
